Compliance.description: Registered SA company (Mobility 24 Pty Ltd 2023/836459/07); no regulatory issues, complaints, or ombudsman cases found; strong consumer protections via warranties/refunds.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Outstanding ratings: HelloPeter 4.9/5 (181), Google 4.9/5, Facebook 5.0/5; praise for service, transparency, staff.

Product Value.description: Competitive fixed prices on inspected used cars; wide range, transparent histories; value boosted by warranties.

Innovation.description: Digital marketplace with online valuation/browsing; hybrid model; group AI/EV plans.

Customer Support.description: Phone/WhatsApp/email channels; reviews highlight quick responses, friendly expert staff.

Accessibility & Security.description: Nationwide online access via website; no explicit POPIA or security details found, but standard digital platform assumed compliant.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Used cars R96k - R600k ZAR, many under R200k

socialSentiment.summary: Positive reviews dominate; no major negatives; promotional X activity.
